title: Nouns Cola Crush
dek: A playable match-3 soda board for Nouns Cola with generator-made arcade graphics, cascades, goals, moves, and local high score.
body:
Nouns Cola now has a playable arcade surface on PointCast. Nouns Cola Crush turns the can run into an 8x8 match-3 board: clear cans, caps, and fizz drops, trigger cascades, beat the move count, and keep a local high score in the browser.

The route uses a generated arcade backdrop made for the game: cola cans, bottle caps, bubbles, candy-like gems, cherries, lemon bolts, and Nouns glasses motifs. The center stays readable for the puzzle board, while the side art keeps the pilot loud and fizzy.

This is not Candy Crush branding or borrowed characters. It is a Nouns Cola game toy for the PointCast pilot, linked back to the operating board, agent JSON, and product plan. Go team.

meta.topics: nouns cola; match-3; arcade; generated graphics; game; pointcast
